head: e1fde0badb87a80fee414d1bca50e4eaeb8e1f32
summary: Re-reviewed at HEAD e1fde0b after the judgment adjudicator's failure_mode:parse_failure unsound verdict. The fix genuinely closes the fail-open: corrupt judgment-adjudication.json now fails loud instead of silently returning null, and corrupt pr-prepare.json raises an explicit parse-failure error instead of being misreported as missing; new regression test JADJ-S-011 is pre-fix-failing by construction. Independently re-ran the story suite (22/22 pass) and typecheck (pass) at e1fde0b; all four verification records are strict-head-bound to e1fde0b with clean worktree and matching 40/40-pass artifact.

findings.detail: typecheck record has artifact=null; honestly disclosed and independently re-verified via node --check
unit/integration/e2e records share bundle artifact focused-e1fde0b.json while commands are subsets; subset re-run passed at same HEAD

inspection_inputs: command: node --check src/adjudication.js src/pr-manager.js src/cli.js -> all pass
